title: Mark's Coins
description: Adds an economy with coins that have some special abilities, can be disabled if not needed
body:
I used MCreator to create this mod for my server and based some textures off of an old mod called Varied Commodities

# **Coins**
#### Common
* Wood (1PC)
* Stone (4PC)
* Copper (16PC)
#### Uncommon
* Iron (64PC)
* Gold (256PC)
* Platinum (1,024PC)
#### Rare
* Amethyst (4096PC)
* Sapphire (16,384PC)
* Ruby (65,536PC)
#### Epic
* Diamond (262,144PC)
* Emerald (1,048,576PC)
* Netherite (4,194,304PC)

**Some Coins have special abilities:**

* Wood - You can use this item as fuel
* Copper - Stand to close to any conductive blocks with these in your pocket...
* Gold - Some times you feel lucky, others...
* Amethyst - Now hear me out, Flowers, maybe...
* Ruby - Trade XP for blood or blood for XP
* Diamond - Harden yourself
* Emerald - Villagers love me
* Netherite - Planes walking or just unlimited ender pearls


**How do you get coins?**

- You can find them from ores or flowers

**How do I store these coins? they take up too much space**

- Craft and ATM machine

**How do I make x coin from y coin**

- To make the next tier, it requires 4 of the one below it. So 4 Wood coins makes 1 Stone coin, and 1 Stone coin makes 4 Wood coins.

**Coin Flower**

The Coin Flower is very fragile, Touch it and it might break into coins.
However if you find a way to harness it's power without touching it, you can harvest coins from it. So long as it has the nutrients it needs.- -
